home.closetEmpty: Your closet is empty. Add pieces for tailor-made suggestions.

weather.storm: Storm ahead. Stay sheltered or pull out the waterproof trench.
weather.snow: It's snowing. Warm coat, knit scarf and boots — full cocoon mode.
weather.rain: Rain on the menu. Long trench, leather boots and an elegant umbrella.
weather.fog: Heavy fog. Layer dark tones, oversized scarf and a mysterious silhouette.
weather.windy: Wind at {{wind}} km/h. Skip flowing pieces, go for tailored cuts.
weather.coldCloud: Cold and overcast. Chunky knit + long coat, sober mood.
weather.cold: It's cold. Layer smart: thin base, sweater, structured coat.
weather.hot: It's hot. Linen, light cotton, bright tones — breathe in style.
weather.cloud: Overcast skies. Perfect for neutral tones and a sharp blazer.
weather.sun: Beautiful weather. Wear what makes you feel good — natural light at its best.
weather.featuredAddon: What if you wore your {{piece}} today?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Vibe, your privacy is essential. This policy explains what data we collect, why, and how you stay in control.
privacy.l1b: Style profile: age, height, weight, preferred styles, vibes, frequented places.
privacy.l1c: Scan photos: temporarily sent to our AI for analysis.
privacy.l1d: Technical data: device, language, anonymized error logs.
privacy.l1e: Payments: handled by Stripe, we never store any banking data.
privacy.l2a: Provide AI styling analysis and personalize your recommendations.
privacy.l2b: Manage your account, your credits, and your scan history.
privacy.l2c: Improve model quality (in an aggregated and anonymized way).
privacy.p3: Your photos are sent to our AI providers (Google Gemini, OpenAI) only to generate the requested analysis. They are not used to train their models and are deleted after processing.
privacy.p4: We never sell your data. It is shared only with: our hosting providers, Stripe (payments), our AI providers, and authorities if the law requires it.
privacy.p5: Your profile data is kept as long as your account is active. You can delete it anytime from Settings → Delete my account. Data is then erased within 30 days, except for legal obligations.
privacy.l6c: Complaint to your local data protection authority.
privacy.p7: HTTPS connection, hashed passwords, data access restricted by Row-Level Security rules at the database level.
privacy.p8: Vibe is not intended for users under 13.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Vibe. By using the app, you accept these Terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.p1: Vibe is a mobile style coaching app powered by artificial intelligence. It offers: outfit analysis (scan), inspirations, personalized advice, and credit purchases.
terms.l2a: You must be at least 13 years old to create an account.
terms.l2b: You provide accurate information and protect your access.
terms.l2c: You are responsible for any activity from your account.
terms.l3b: Credits are bought in packs (Starter, Vibe Pack, Stylist, Premium) via Stripe.
terms.l3c: Credits are tied to your account and never expire.
terms.l3d: Credits are neither refundable nor convertible into cash, except as required by law.
terms.p4: Pursuant to article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code, the purchase of credits is digital content executed immediately with your express consent. You therefore waive your right of withdrawal as soon as a credit is first used.
terms.l5a: No illegal, hateful, sexually explicit, or harmful content.
terms.l5b: No scanning people without their consent.
terms.l5c: No bypassing, scraping, or reverse engineering attempts.
terms.p6: Vibe, its logo, design, and code are protected. You keep the rights to your photos, but grant us a license to process them as part of the service.
terms.p7: Analyses are generated by AI models. They are indicative and subjective, with no guarantee of accuracy. They do not constitute professional advice.
terms.p8: Shopping links may be affiliate links. The price you pay is not affected.
terms.p9: We may suspend your account in case of Terms violation. You may delete your account anytime from Settings.
terms.p10: The service is provided "as is". We are not liable for indirect damages related to using the app, within the limits allowed by law.
terms.p11: French law. Competent courts: those of the publisher's registered office.

scanDialog.shareDesc: By sharing, you confirm you are the author of the photo and allow Vibe to display it publicly in the weekly leaderboard. The photo will be deleted at the weekly reset (unless you finish #1, in which case it joins the Hall of Fame).
scanDialog.pickerDesc: Take a full-body photo (natural light) or import an existing one.
scanDialog.occasionDesc: Tell Vibe where you'll wear this outfit. More context = sharper advice.
scanDialog.occasionPlaceholder: E.g. fancy indoor dinner, I want to look elegant without overdoing it.

stylistChat.scanIntro: Verdict delivered. Ask me anything — color, cut, accessory, alternative to buy.
stylistChat.scanSug2: How to wear this in winter?

challenge.step1: Before taking your photo, integrate the challenge element into your outfit.
challenge.step2: The item must be clearly visible in the photo (the AI checks).
challenge.step3: Run your scan: if validated, the challenge counts toward the streak.
